articles.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch coordinated attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north of the country in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

articles.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
articles.summary: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.
